title: MoreTaggedRecipies
description: Adds much more ways to craft stone tools including common tags like forge:stone and forge:sandstone. also contains its own tag for vanilla blocks like end stone, red sandstone, stone bricks, Also backports some new recipies like saddles and leads
body:
Adds much more ways to craft stone tools including common tags like forge:stone and forge:sandstone. also contains its own tag for vanilla blocks like end stone, red sandstone, stone bricks

Some mods can't be connected properly in 1 datapack, head to https://modrinth.com/datapack/moretaggedrecipies-compatibility-extensions for compatibility extensions

Backports some newer recipie changes (saddle and lead) and tags them.

Makes much more items recycleable by smelting (golden apples, clocks, buckets, rails, compasses)

Banners, carpets and beds can now be dyed with any dye like wool.

Note: this is created for 1.16.5 and 1.18.2 forge, these versions get updates since they are the versions I play. The extra versions (1.16x, 1.17x, 1.18x, 1.19x) are added because after testing they seem to work, but other mod loaders won't fully work since some features use forge tags
